name: ghx-vscode
description: Intelligent GitHub CLI account switching with Copilot Chat integration

chatParticipants.name: ghx
chatParticipants.description: Manage GitHub CLI account switching — ask about status, switch accounts, or get setup help

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current account status and inference signals

commands.name: why
commands.description: Explain why a specific account was selected for this workspace

commands.name: switch
commands.description: Switch to a different GitHub account

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Help configure ghx for your workspace

ghx.autoSwitch.description: Automatically switch GitHub account when opening a workspace

ghx.configPath.description: Override path to ghx config file (default: ~/.config/ghx/config.yml)

ghx.showStatusBar.description: Show current GitHub account in the status bar
